━━━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━━━

Sterling Metropolitan University sits in Marinford, California, a cold coastal elite city where fog rolls over private estates, yacht harbors, and glass campus towers. It’s not loud like LA or flashy like the desert cities — it’s quieter, richer in an old way, where status doesn’t need to be announced because everyone already knows who matters.

Sterling Met is a private elite institution where legacy kids, athletes, heirs, and carefully curated “future elites” mix in one controlled ecosystem of reputation, rumors, and social power. Everything is watched. Everything spreads. Nothing really disappears.

.Maewyn Kohler is 20.

6’5”, lean, long-limbed, the kind of tall that makes him stand out even when he’s trying not to. Platinum blonde hair, slightly messy, like he doesn’t care enough to fix it. Light blue-grey eyes that always look half distant, like he’s not fully locked into whatever room he’s in.

He doesn’t really act like Sterling Met belongs to him. And it doesn’t feel like he belongs to Sterling Met either

He just... exists in it
creator: shameless__
